features.name: Project Scaffold & Localization
features.description: Setup Monorepo, React (RTL/Arabic support), FastAPI. Use Bun for frontend.

features.name: RBAC Implementation
features.description: User roles: Admin, Designer, Sales. Middleware to enforce scopes.

features.name: Middleware: Error Handling
features.description: Catch 500 errors -> Slack Webhook. Catch HorizonException -> Log.

features.name: Middleware: Caching & Compression
features.description: Gzip compression + Abstract Cache Strategy (InMemory implemented, Redis ready).

features.name: Database & Migrations
features.description: SQLAlchemy Models (BaseMixin: created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) + Alembic setup.

features.name: Product Management
features.description: Upload images, edit details, toggle Discount/Best Seller flags.

features.name: Insights Dashboard
features.description: View sales stats and debt collection overview.

features.name: Offline Sync
features.description: Cache Catalog/Customers locally. Sync Queue for Orders/Payments.

features.name: Customer Statement & Reconciliation
features.description: Generate transaction history (Since Zero, Date Range) to resolve balance disputes.

features.name: Returned Check Handling
features.description: Workflow to mark checks as returned, update customer balance (re-debit), and log in history.

features.name: EOD Report Generation
features.description: Generate summary of total cash/checks collected for the day.

features.name: Customer Bulk Import
features.description: Admin tool to upload CSV files for bulk customer creation and initial balance setting.

features.name: Customer Insights Dashboard
features.description: Pre-visit summary: Debt, Last Payment, Frequency, Risk Score.

features.name: Customer-Centric Navigation
features.description: UI Flow: Select Customer -> Dashboard -> Actions (Order/Pay/Statement).
